---
title: "Appendix A - Geographe Marine Park Natural Values Report"
subtitle: "South-west Marine Parks Network"
format:
  pdf:
    output-file: "Project 4.21-Geographe-2-Appendix A-q-Natural values.pdf"
    geometry: 
      - top=2cm
      - bottom=2.5cm
      - left=2cm
      - right=2cm
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
post-render: 11_move-pdf.R
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)
library(cowplot)
library(png)
library(grid)
library(tidytext)
library(ggtext)
```

# Natural Values

Understanding of natural values

## Benthic ecosystem extent

### Dominant habitat types

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-cap: "Predicted dominant habitat type from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing.The green polygon represents the extent of no-take National Park Zones and State no-take sanctuary zones. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."
p_cat_multi <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-habitat-categorical_2014-2024.rds"))
p_cat_multi
```

### Habitat distribution and probability

```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-cap: "Predicted habitat distribution probability and uncertainty from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. The green polygon represents the extent of no-take National Park Zones. Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."
include_graphics(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-dominant-benthos-and-combined-se_2014-2024.png"))
```

### Observations

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-cap: "Habitat classes observed in stereo-BRUV imagery. Habitat classes observed in spatially balanced stereo-BRUV and drop-camera imagery visualised as spatial pie charts. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."
p_scatterpie_multi <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_scatterpie_2014-2024.rds"))
p_scatterpie_multi
```

## Benchmarks of benthic natural values

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8.5
#| fig-cap: "Seagrass: (a) temporal plots by depth contour and (b) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_control-plot_seagrass.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-habitat_seagrass_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.1, 0.8, 0.1))

plot_grid(top_row, p_spatial,
          nrow = 2, labels = c("a)", "b)"),
          rel_heights = c(1, 1.2))
```

## Benchmarks of benthic natural values

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8.5
#| fig-cap: "Macroalgae: (a) temporal plots by depth contour and (b) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_control-plot_macroalgae.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-habitat_macroalgae_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.1, 0.8, 0.1))

plot_grid(top_row, p_spatial,
          nrow = 2, labels = c("a)", "b)"),
          rel_heights = c(1, 1.2))
```

## Benchmarks of benthic natural values

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8.5
#| fig-cap: "Sessile invertebrates: (a) temporal plots by depth contour and (b) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_control-plot_sessile-invertebrates.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-habitat_sessile-invertebrates_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.1, 0.8, 0.1))

plot_grid(top_row, p_spatial,
          nrow = 2, labels = c("a)", "b)"),
          rel_heights = c(1, 1.2))
```

## Benchmarks of demersal fish natural values

### Species richness

```{r}
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Figure A 3.1 Demersal fish - Species richness: (a) temporal plots by depth contour (b) species accumulation curve by zone type and (c) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_control-plot_species-richness-per-bruv.rds"))

p_bar <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_SAC-sample.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-fish-metric_whole-assemblage_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.15, 0.7, 0.15))
mid_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_bar, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.15, 0.7, 0.15))

plot_grid(top_row, mid_row, p_spatial,
          nrow = 3, labels = c("a)", "b)", "c)"),
          rel_heights = c(0.4, 0.3, 0.5))
```

### Total abundance

```{r}
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Demersal fish - Total abundance: (a) temporal plots by depth contour (b) top 10 most abundant species and (c) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. **Bold** species are unique within the 10 most abundant species by year. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_control-plot_total-abundance-per-bruv.rds"))

p_bar <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_top_maxn_bar_plot.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-fish-metric_total-abundance_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.15, 0.7, 0.15))

plot_grid(top_row, p_bar, p_spatial,
          nrow = 3, labels = c("a)", "b)", "c)"),
          rel_heights = c(0.35, 0.4, 0.45))
```

\newgeometry{top=2cm, bottom=2.1cm, left=2cm, right=2cm}

### Large Reef Fish Index\*

```{r}
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Demersal fish - Large Reef Fish Index\\*: (a) temporal plots by depth contour (b) top 10 greatest biomass species by status and (c) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. **Bold** species are unique within the 10 greatest biomass species by year. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown. \\*Large Reef Fish Index representing the biomass of all fish greater than 20 cm (B20) has been adapted here for stereo-BRUV data by removing sharks and rays."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_control-plot_large-reef-fish-index-biomass-g-per-bruv.rds"))

p_bar <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_top_b20_bar_plot_mixed.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-fish-metric_large-reef-fish-index_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.15, 0.7, 0.15))

plot_grid(top_row, p_bar, p_spatial,
          nrow = 3, labels = c("a)", "b)", "c)"),
          rel_heights = c(0.35, 0.4, 0.45))
```

\restoregeometry

### Reef fish thermal index

```{r}
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Demersal fish - Reef Fish Thermal Index: (a) temporal plots by depth contour (b) Species Thermal Niche of top 10 most abundant species and (c) spatial plots of distribution probability and uncertainty; from stereo-BRUV groundtruthing. Dashed vertical line indicates the date of establishment of the marine park. GMP = GMP (Commonwealth), HPZ = Habitat Protection Zone, NPZ = National Park Zone, NCMP = Ngari Capes Marine Park (State), SZ = Sanctuary Zone. State and Commonwealth marine park boundaries are shown. **Bold** species are unique within the 10 most abundant species by year. The red line delimits state and commonwealth waters. Bathymetric contour at 30 m is shown."

p_control <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_control-plot_community-thermal-index-c.rds"))

p_bar <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_top_maxn_cti_bar_plot.rds"))

img_path <- here("plots/geographe/fish/GeographeAMP_predicted-individual-fish-metric_cti_2014-2024.png")
img <- png::readPNG(img_path)
grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)
p_spatial <- ggdraw() + draw_grob(grob)

top_row <- plot_grid(NULL, p_control, NULL, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.15, 0.7, 0.15))

plot_grid(top_row, p_bar, p_spatial,
          nrow = 3, labels = c("a)", "b)", "c)"),
          rel_heights = c(0.35, 0.4, 0.45))
```
